case_title: ETHAN ASHLEY VS. BAY WEST PROPERTY MANAGEMENT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-10-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-10-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ETHAN ASHLEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BAY WEST PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, REPRESENTED BY COLLIN LYNCH IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (NO FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED JAN-24-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BAY WEST PROPERTY MANAGEMENT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2020 - JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, CLERK WILLIAM TRUPEK, NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) COLLIN LYNCH, OWNER FILED BY DEFENDANT BAY WEST PROPERTY MANAGEMENT
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR SEP-16-2020 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER SEE ATTACHED DOC. FILED BY BAY WEST PROPERTY MANAGEMENT ASHLEY, ETHAN

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF SEP-16-2020 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF MAR-20-2020 REMAINS THE SAME. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.
REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER TBE JUNE 10, 2021 ORDER.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASHLEY, ETHAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAY WEST PROPERTY MANAGEMENT $9,756.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,756.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ASHLEY, ETHAN AS TO DEFENDANT BAY WEST PROPERTY MANAGEMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-10-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT - SENT TO DEFENDANT / UNABLE TO FORWARD -
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED AT INSISENCE OF LITGANT- UNTIMLY FILED FILED BY APPELLANT BAY WEST PROPERTY MANAGEMENT MAILED TO RESPONDENT ASHLEY, ETHAN
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-16-2020 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT ASHLEY, ETHAN RECOVER FROM APPELLANT BAY WEST PROPERTY MANAGEMENT $9,756.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,756.00, THE NOTICE OF APPEAL IS UNTIMELY(SEE CAL. CODE CIV. PROC.116.750(B) CAL. R. CT. 8.954(B)(3), BUT THE COURT AFFIRMS THE JUDGMENT ON THE MERITS. NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
